text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "OntoProtein: Protein Pretraining With Gene Ontology Embedding" is real and was published at ICLR 2022, but the cited authors (Yue Zhang, Xiang Li, Yifan Zhao, Shuang Wang, Liang Gao) are completely fabricated — the actual authors are Ningyu Zhang, Zhen Bi, Xiaozhuan Liang, Siyuan Cheng, Haosen Hong, Shumin Deng, Qiang Zhang, Jiazhang Lian, and Huajun Chen. The venue is also wrong (cited as NeurIPS, actually ICLR 2022), making this a classic "grafted" hallucination with a real title but entirely wrong authorship and venue.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11147
